---
title: "For Vendors"
description: "How vendors get set up, build a verified profile, and respond to RFPs on SpotlightVendor."
---

If you provide services to senior living or healthcare facilities — janitorial, HVAC, plumbing, landscaping, electrical, life safety, food service, IT, equipment maintenance, anything — SpotlightVendor connects you with operators looking for compliant, vetted vendors.

A facility you already work with may have invited you here. Or you may have signed up directly. Either way, this is your starting point.

## The fastest path to your first won bid

1. **Complete your profile** — name, services, service area, employees, year established, business type.
2. **Upload your compliance documents** — current insurance certificate (COI), W-9, workers' comp. Our admin team reviews within 1-2 business days.
3. **Watch the RFP feed.** Once you're verified, RFPs that match your services and service area show up in your dashboard.
4. **Bid early.** Most facilities review bids in the order they come in. The first 3-5 bids get the most attention.

Questions? Email [hi@spotlightvendor.com](mailto:hi@spotlightvendor.com).
